ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player's account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the player's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief bio or description of the player */,
  "location" TEXT /* The player's location */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The player's date of birth */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the player's account is active */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity (e.g., playing a game, logging in) */,
  "total_sessions_joined" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions the player has joined */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* The player's win rate across all sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the session (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode of the session (e.g., competitive, cooperative) */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the session */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "organizer_id" TEXT /* ID of the player who organized the session */,
  "spectator_count" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in the session */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the session is private or public */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game used in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_players" (
  "session_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-player relationship */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player joined the session */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player left the session */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the session (e.g., bidder, responder) */,
  "spectator" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the player is a spectator */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player in the session */,
  "is_ready" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the player is ready to start the session */,
  "disconnect_reason" TEXT /* Reason for disconnection if the player left the session */,
  "total_rounds_played" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds played by the player in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_players_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the game (e.g., game, setup) */,
  "step" TEXT /* Step in the game (e.g., bidder, responder) */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of the action */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time taken for the action in milliseconds */,
  "timeup" INTEGER /* Time at which the action was allowed (in milliseconds) */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., bid, respond, move) */,
  "action_data" TEXT /* Additional data related to the action (e.g., bid amount, move coordinates) */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates or position data related to the action */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the action was valid */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if the action was invalid */,
  "elapsed_time" INTEGER /* Elapsed time since the start of the round */,
  "action_source" TEXT /* Source of the action (e.g., mobile, web) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_actions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_actions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, player, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing specific permissions for the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role is a default role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "revoked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was revoked */,
  "revoked_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who revoked the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role assignment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., bid, respond, move) */,
  "action_data" TEXT /* Data related to the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical record was created */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round in which the action occurred */,
  "stage_description" TEXT /* Description of the stage of the game */,
  "action_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_history_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES session_actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_history_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_statistics" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of session statistics */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "total_bids" INTEGER /* Total number of bids made by the player */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses made by the player */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average response time of the player */,
  "total_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds played by the player */,
  "win_count" INTEGER /* Number of rounds won by the player */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the session */,
  "average_points_per_round" REAL /* Average points scored per round */,
  "longest_streak" INTEGER /* Longest winning streak in the session */,
  "shortest_response_time" INTEGER /* Shortest response time in milliseconds */,
  "longest_response_time" INTEGER /* Longest response time in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_statistics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the player (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the player */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback is anonymous */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., technical, gameplay, social) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who resolved the feedback */,
  "resolution_comment" TEXT /* Comment provided when resolving the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_feedback_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)
